text: Hi, I'm recording this short video to show how to create one brand registry profile. First of all, I'll give you this link and you have to scroll down and go here, click on this. And then we have to select the marketplace, which in our case is Canada. We'll select that and now we have to log in. So you already have a seller central account. All you have to do is you have to use the same email address and password to log in. And after that they may ask you for a few more things but then you are done for. Done with creating the brand register profile. I want to talk about one more thing. Which is, which is this you have to click on like after logging into your seller central account, you have to click on account info. Go click on this merchant token and give me this, this thing, this letter number combination. I think this number will be the same on both of our accounts here. But I still want to verify this. That's all. Thank you so much.
